generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor providing speed, position, and other metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw vehicle state information transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data after DBSCAN clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed vehicle state information after unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model utilizing DBSCAN for raw LiDAR point cloud clustering and Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50, MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model computing vehicle speed based on sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50, MATLABSimulink
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for application development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for application development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and modeling"
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks via a user interface with data saving and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceTracking
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, actuation command transmission) from vehicle hardware to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedCalculation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands remotely through UI for ADAS development and testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance SystemPerformanceTracking : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time system performance tracking for monitoring system health and data"
]

instance DesiredSpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on lead vehicle detection and distance"
]

instance EnableDisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator-initiated enable/disable of Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed parameters via remote interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote initiation of emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle retrofitted with advanced sensor and control technology for ACC system implementation"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin entity deployed as a ROS2 package on separate hardware"
]

instance User : DTDFVocab:Agent [
    base:desc "User entity deployed as a ROS2 package on separate hardware"
]

instance UserInterface3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance UserInterfaceControlPanel : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for User entity components"
    base:contains UserInterface3DVisualization, UserInterfaceControlPanel
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Data Collection Functional Entity for sensor data ingestion"
]

instance DeviceControlFE : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Device Control Functional Entity for actuation commands"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Functional Entity for handling raw LiDAR point cloud data"
]

instance ISODataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation Functional Entity for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for Digital Twin components"
    base:contains DataCollectionFE, DeviceControlFE, DataPreProcessingFE, ISODataTranslationFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., desired speed, emergency braking) generated by ACC Controlling FE are serialized and converted via Data Translation FE, then transmitted over Wi-Fi UDP to Actuation FE. The Actuation FE converts these commands into motor voltage and steering servo signals for physical actuation, with feedback loops confirming execution through sensor data."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, as mandated by safety-critical vehicular standards, though hardware limitations necessitate this specific threshold."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, organizing software components into entity-based structures (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User Entities). Each entity is deployed on dedicated hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity deviating from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) instead of resource-specific OME functionality, impacting ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, and inter-entity communication is conducted over Wi-Fi using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Computation is off-loaded to cloud resources for critical or non-critical tasks as specified in Section III.A. Ego vehicle state data is stored on an external device per Requirement R3. No details on computational requirements, scalability mechanisms beyond off-loading, deployment models, or availability/reliability assurances are provided in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard for Digital Twin framework in manufacturing, structured into four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The Reference architecture (Part 2) defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities may utilize OPC Unified Architecture for interoperability, though the standard does not specify implementation details for FEs."
]
